content: Blade of the Titan (SSR) & Analysis of Death (SR)
is there already a list on caro reruns next week for one in a mill event
Next week is Aequor followed by Ultra, Caro will be last
ah right, is there list on aequor reruns?
Like which Aequor Characters will be available on Chronos Mandate (/ One In A Million)?
yesss
All of them will be available, but the main priority would typically be GMurphy closely followed by Corpo
Is corpo wheel mandatory?
No
Not necessary
My gmurphy is still E0, i dont think i need to pull her to E3… so i was thinking for corpo if it would be fine
E0 Corpo is viable right?
Like if you're targeting WoDs, you could go for Tulu or Murphy
Yh, will just need a source of Vulnerable + Weakness
As she cannot provide it herself

E2 (Weakness Application via 2-Cost)
E3 (Vulnerable Application via Exalt)
I heard she becomes dps at OE
Can she be a dps for dtide comps?

She's already a DPS without it, it's just that without E1 she'll have trouble scaling (Aftershocking base Defense + Strike to generate Perm Strength) and without E2 / E3 she'll need another source of Weakness + Vulnerable which makes her more inconsistent
Yh, can be used for earlier Waves
Likely for A2 - A3
can you recommend comps for her? I might aim E3 during her rerun
Also, how do i trigger the aftershock effect?

Aurita OE, Cassiah E3, Horla E1

Tulu E3, GMurphy E3, Murphy E1
Aftershock triggers on Discard
she will struggle at a5 without extra help even on easier waves

try to go for this, use titan blade on kath for now, the empty spaces are whatever use sigil gain, dr or brow r wheels. gramona is there for card draw, keyflare gain and can generate cards/change posse with exalt, so you can get more kath cards out of thin air.
